app.title: CGX Debug Tablet
app.chooseFolder: Choose a folder to list its contents.
app.previewHint: Select a file to read its text content, or open a subfolder. Use Settings to restore ignored folders.
app.encryptedBadgeHint: This file is opened as electron-store encrypted (right-click to change).
app.lmdbBadgeHint: Opened as LMDB (right-click to change). Double-click the folder to browse inside.
app.mapBadgeHint: This GeoJSON file is on the map (Settings → remove or right-click the file).
app.configFileBadgeHint: Designated workspace config file (JSON). Preview opens as a structured form.
app.configTreePathsExcluded: All entries at this level are hidden by path rules in Settings.
app.logLevelFilterAria: Show or hide log lines by level
app.logTimeFilterAria: Filter log lines by time range
app.logLevelAllHidden: All log levels are hidden. Turn at least one level on to see lines.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Manage ignored folder names and optional LMDB preview. Configuration is stored with <bold>electron-store</bold>.
settings.ignoredHint: Folders you hide via right-click → "Ignore folder" are listed here. Use "Restore" to show one name again, or "Restore all" to clear the list.
settings.ignoredExtHint: Files with these extensions are hidden in the explorer (e.g. tmp, map). Enter without the dot.
settings.geoMapHint: Layers added from the explorer (right-click a .geojson file → Add to map) are stored here as paths relative to the workspace folder.
settings.geoMapEmpty: No GeoJSON layers on the map yet.
settings.workspaceConfigHint: One JSON file can be designated per workspace (Explorer → right-click a file). It opens in the preview as nested sections and fields.
settings.workspaceConfigEmpty: No workspace config file is set.
settings.configFormExcludedTitle: Workspace config form — hidden JSON paths
settings.configFormExcludedHint: Dotted paths (e.g. auth.apiKey or items.0.secret) are not shown in the config preview. Use one * to match any single segment — e.g. users.*.password hides password under every user in an array. The file on disk is unchanged.
settings.configFormExcludedEmpty: No paths hidden. Add sensitive paths so they never appear in the structured preview.
settings.workspaceRootLabel: Workspace folder (relative paths are based on this directory):
settings.lmdbHint: LMDB path: full path (absolute or relative to the workspace), or file name only (e.g. vehicles_paths_db.lmdb) to match that database anywhere in the tree. If empty, LMDB_PATH from the environment is used when loading sample keys.
settings.lmdbRulesIntro: Timeline: one row per database — LMDB path (or file name only) and a JavaScript RegExp to read the time from each key (first capture group preferred). First matching row wins.
settings.lmdbRulesHint: Example file: vehicles_paths_db.lmdb — example regex: ^\\d+:(\\d+)$ for keys like 131:1776067297.
settings.lmdbRulePathAria: LMDB database path or base file name
settings.storeKeyHint: Encrypted file preview: set STORE_KEY in the project `.env` (same key as electron-store encryptionKey) so the app can decrypt.
settings.extensionHint: Choose whether files with each extension open as UTF-8 text or as an image preview. Built-in defaults include common image types; you can add or override (e.g. svg as text for source editing).
settings.logsHint: Lines are colored by the first rule whose text appears as a substring (order matters). By default, highlighting applies to files ending in .log only.
settings.logForAllTextLabel: Apply these rules to all text previews (not only .log files)

lmdb.empty: No keys (empty path or empty database).

lmdbTimeline.calendarDayAria: Open calendar to pick a day (24-hour window for the sliders)
lmdbTimeline.dayNoDataOverlap: No data falls on this local calendar day within the database span; try another date or clear the day filter.
lmdbTimeline.truncated: Row limit reached; narrow the time range for more detail.
lmdbTimeline.chartNoNumeric: No numeric fields found in the payload for this range.
lmdbTimeline.chartSeriesHint: Toggle which numeric JSON fields to plot (same time axis). Very different scales (e.g. lat vs rpm) may look flat—select fewer or similar fields.
lmdbTimeline.chartPickSeries: Select at least one field below to draw the chart.
lmdbTimeline.chartBrushHint: Drag the range below the chart to zoom the time axis (chart only).
lmdbTimeline.rulesActiveRegex: Active key regex for this database: {{regex}}
lmdbTimeline.rulesHeuristicOnly: No configured regex applies; timestamps are inferred from keys/values (built-in heuristics).

confirm.clearIgnored: Remove all ignored folder names? Those folders will show again in the sidebar everywhere.
confirm.clearIgnoredExtensions: Remove all ignored file extensions? Matching files will show again in the explorer.
confirm.clearConfigFormExcluded: Remove all hidden JSON paths? The config file is not modified; the preview will show the full tree again.
